Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team is ready to begin on time when called
Evidence To Observe: Demo starts without delay beyond allocated transition/setup

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Demo environment is operational at start (app loads successfully)
Evidence To Observe: App loads and is usable before scripted steps begin

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Prepared data includes at least one non-engineering profile
Evidence To Observe: Profile data shown is not limited to software roles only

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Two distinct accounts are prepared (User A and User B)
Evidence To Observe: Team can switch between accounts for security checks

Checklist Item (Yes/No): User registration works with email and password
Evidence To Observe: New user can be created successfully

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Duplicate-email registration is rejected with clear message (negative)
Evidence To Observe: Duplicate registration attempt fails with meaningful feedback

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Valid login works for registered user
Evidence To Observe: User reaches authenticated state after login

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Invalid password login shows meaningful error (negative)
Evidence To Observe: Login fails gracefully with clear message

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Logout invalidates session and protected page access is denied (negative)
Evidence To Observe: After logout protected route/API access is blocked

Checklist Item (Yes/No): User B cannot view/modify User A owned data (negative security case)
Evidence To Observe: Cross-user access attempt fails as expected

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Dashboard opens as primary workspace
Evidence To Observe: Dashboard is the main post-login home flow

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Job cards render baseline fields
Evidence To Observe: Card includes title, company, stage, last activity

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team can create a new job from dashboard flow
Evidence To Observe: New job appears after create action

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team can edit an existing job from dashboard flow
Evidence To Observe: Existing job update is reflected on UI

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Job data persists after refresh/navigation
Evidence To Observe: Created/edited job remains after reload

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Profile baseline section is present (identity/contact + summary)
Evidence To Observe: Required Sprint 1 profile sections are visible

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Profile baseline update saves successfully
Evidence To Observe: Edited profile fields persist after save

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Profile completion indicator updates when baseline data changes
Evidence To Observe: Indicator changes after update to baseline fields

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Profile validation failure shows clear field-level feedback (negative)
Evidence To Observe: Invalid/missing required input produces clear validation message

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Settings page exists and is reachable in app shell
Evidence To Observe: Settings is present and navigable

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Typography is consistent across Dashboard, Profile, and Settings
Evidence To Observe: Same typographic system is used across major Sprint 1 screens

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Form and error styling is consistent across major Sprint 1 screens
Evidence To Observe: Inputs/labels/errors follow consistent style rules

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team opens GitHub Actions and shows latest relevant workflow run
Evidence To Observe: Actions page is shown live with recent run context

Checklist Item (Yes/No): GitHub Actions evidence shows build + unit test execution
Evidence To Observe: Workflow details clearly include build/test jobs

Checklist Item (Yes/No): Team is prepared to show at least three negative unit tests and explain each
Evidence To Observe: Three negative tests are shown and briefly explained
